clips.title: Sunbather
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, bright grade. A sandy beach seen from directly overhead, a striped towel on golden sand, footprints, a scattering of shells. Midday, brilliant sun. A person in swimwear lies on the towel below, arms relaxed. A bird's-eye view looking straight down from directly above. Warm hard sunlight, top-down, bird's-eye view. Crisp detail, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Spiral
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, elegant grade. An ornate spiral staircase seen from directly overhead, curving down many floors, marble and iron. Day, soft skylight. A person in a long coat stands at the center of the ground floor far below, looking up. A bird's-eye view looking straight down through the spiral. Soft skylight glow, dramatic geometry, top-down, bird's-eye view. Crisp detail, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Crossing
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, urban grade. A city zebra crosswalk seen from directly overhead, bold white stripes on grey asphalt, road markings. Day, bright. A person in a smart coat walks across the stripes below, mid-stride. A bird's-eye view looking straight down from directly above. Bright even light, graphic top-down, bird's-eye view. Crisp detail, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Rower
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, serene grade. A still lake seen from directly overhead, a small wooden rowboat, gentle ripples spreading, deep green water. Morning, calm. A person in casual clothes sits in the rowboat below, oars out. A bird's-eye view looking straight down from directly above. Soft morning light, calm top-down, bird's-eye view. Crisp detail, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, calm grade. A city rooftop terrace seen from directly overhead, a yoga mat, potted plants, tiled floor. Morning, soft light. A person in athletic wear lies in a resting yoga pose on the mat below. A bird's-eye view looking straight down from directly above. Soft warm light, top-down, bird's-eye view. clips.title: The Maze
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, lush grade. A manicured garden hedge maze seen from directly overhead, geometric green pathways, a fountain at the center. Afternoon, warm. A person in light clothes walks along one of the maze paths below. A bird's-eye view looking straight down from directly above. Warm daylight, graphic top-down, bird's-eye view. Crisp detail, subtle grain, 24fps.
